description: Use the N/render module for printing, PDF creation, form creation from templates, and email creation from templates.

methods.name: bom
methods.description: Creates a PDF or HTML file object containing a bill of materials.

params.name: options.entityId
params.description: The internal ID of the transaction associated with the bom.

params.name: options.printMode
params.description: The print output type. Use the render.PrintMode enum to set this value.

params.name: options.inCustLocale
params.description: Applies when advanced templates are used. Print the document in the customer's locale.

methods.name: mergeEmail
methods.description: Creates a render.EmailMergeResult object for a mail merge with an existing scriptable email template.

params.name: options.templateId
params.description: Internal ID of the template.

params.name: options.entity
params.description: The entity. Object with id (number) and type (string) properties.

params.name: options.recipient
params.description: The recipient. Object with id (number) and type (string) properties.

params.name: options.customRecord
params.description: The custom record. Object with id (number) and type (string) properties.

params.name: options.supportCaseId
params.description: The support case ID.

params.name: options.transactionId
params.description: The transaction ID.

methods.name: packingSlip
methods.description: Creates a PDF or HTML file object containing a packing slip.

params.name: options.entityId
params.description: The internal ID of the transaction associated with the packing slip.

params.name: options.printMode
params.description: The print output type. Set using the render.PrintMode enum.

params.name: options.formId
params.description: The packing slip form number.

params.name: options.fulfillmentId
params.description: The fulfillment ID number.

params.name: options.inCustLocale
params.description: Applies when advanced templates are used. Print the document in the customer's locale.

methods.name: pickingTicket
methods.description: Creates a PDF or HTML file object containing a picking ticket.

params.name: options.entityId
params.description: The internal ID of the transaction associated with the picking ticket.

params.name: options.printMode
params.description: The print output type. Use the render.PrintMode enum to set this value.

params.name: options.formId
params.description: The picking ticket form number.

params.name: options.shipgroup
params.description: The shipping group for the ticket.

params.name: options.location
params.description: The location for the ticket.

params.name: options.inCustLocale
params.description: Applies when advanced templates are used. Prints the document in the customer's locale.

methods.name: statement
methods.description: Creates a PDF or HTML file object containing a statement.

params.name: options.entityId
params.description: The internal ID of the statement to print.

params.name: options.printMode
params.description: The print output type. Use the render.PrintMode enum to set this value.

params.name: options.formId
params.description: The internal ID of the form to use to print the statement.

params.name: options.startDate
params.description: Date of the oldest transaction to appear on the statement.

params.name: options.statementDate
params.description: The statement date.

params.name: options.openTransactionsOnly
params.description: Flag to include only open transactions.

params.name: options.consolidateStatements
params.description: Flag to convert all amount values to the base currency.

params.name: options.inCustLocale
params.description: Applies when advanced templates are used. Prints the document in the customer's locale.

params.name: options.subsidiaryId
params.description: ID of the subsidiary. Only works for advanced printing.

methods.name: transaction
methods.description: Creates a PDF or HTML file object of a transaction.

params.name: options.entityId
params.description: The internal ID of the transaction to print.

params.name: options.printMode
params.description: The print output type. Use the render.PrintMode enum to set this value.

params.name: options.formId
params.description: The transaction form number.

params.name: options.inCustLocale
params.description: Applies when advanced templates are used. Prints the document in the customer's locale.

methods.name: xmlToPdf
methods.description: Passes XML to the BFO tag library (which is stored by NetSuite), and returns a PDF file.

params.name: options.xmlString
params.description: XML string to convert to PDF.

enums.name: DataSource
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported data source types. Use this enum to set the options.format parameter of the TemplateRenderer.addCustomDataSource(options) method.

enums.name: PrintMode
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported print output types.

members.name: DEFAULT
members.description: Uses the company/user preference for print output

properties.name: body
properties.description: The body of the email distribution in string format.

properties.name: subject
properties.description: The subject of the email distribution in string format.

objectTypes.name: TemplateRenderer
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a template object that produces HTML and PDF printed forms utilizing advanced PDF/HTML template capabilities.

methods.name: addCustomDataSource
methods.description: Adds XML or JSON as custom data source to an advanced PDF/HTML template.

params.name: options.alias
params.description: Data source alias.

params.name: options.format
params.description: Data format. Use render.DataSource enum values.

params.name: options.data
params.description: Object, document, or string.

methods.name: addQuery
methods.description: Uses a query as the renderer's data source.

params.name: options.templateName
params.description: Variable name in the template.

params.name: options.query
params.description: Query object.

methods.name: addRecord
methods.description: Binds a record to a template variable.

params.name: options.templateName
params.description: Variable name in the template.

params.name: options.record
params.description: Record object to bind.

methods.name: addSearchResults
methods.description: Binds a search result to a template variable.

params.name: options.templateName
params.description: Variable name in the template.

params.name: options.searchResult
params.description: Search result array.

methods.name: renderAsPdf
methods.description: Uses an advanced template to produce a PDF printed form.

methods.name: renderAsString
methods.description: Returns template content in string form.

methods.name: renderPdfToResponse
methods.description: Renders PDF template content as a server response.

params.name: options.response
params.description: Response object to render PDF to.

methods.name: renderToResponse
methods.description: Renders HTML template content as a server response.

params.name: options.response
params.description: Response object to render to.

methods.name: setTemplateById
methods.description: Sets the template using the internal ID.

params.name: options.id
params.description: Template internal ID.

methods.name: setTemplateByScriptId
methods.description: Sets the template using the script ID.

params.name: options.scriptId
params.description: Template script ID.
